nasb.text: Then King Nebuchadnezzar fell on his face and did homage to Daniel, and gave orders to present to him an offering and fragrant incense.

esv.text: Then King Nebuchadnezzar fell upon his face and paid homage to Daniel, and commanded that an offering and incense be offered up to him.

cnv.text: 尼布甲尼撒王俯伏在地，向但以理下拜，又下令向但以理獻上供物和香品。

ccb.text: 尼布甲尼撒王俯伏在地，向但以理下拜，并下令给他献供物和香。
